title: Overlay GC removes stale entries and hooks run it
description:
## Intent
As a developer, I want stale overlay entries removed automatically so overlays remain self-pruning.

## Gherkin
Feature: Overlay garbage collection
  Scenario: Remove stale overlay entries
    Given a base issue "kbs-123" updated_at "2026-03-03T00:00:00Z"
    And an overlay issue "kbs-123" with overlay_ts "2026-03-01T00:00:00Z"
    When I run "kanbus overlay gc"
    Then the overlay issue is removed

  Scenario: Hook-based cleanup after git operation
    Given overlay entries exist
    When a git post-merge hook runs "kanbus overlay gc"
    Then stale overlay entries are removed

## Definition of Done
- overlay gc removes stale entries and hook installer registers git hooks.
creator: ryan.porter
